programme.title: Assassin's Creed
programme.desc: Recidivist Callum Lynch sentenced to death is not executed.After a fake execution, he ends up in a secret laboratory.There he meets Rikkin and his daughter Sofia.Scientists have a mysterious device that allows them to access the records of ancestors' actions stored in their genes.The criminal is to connect with the consciousness of Aguilar from Spain, who lived during the Great Inquisition and obtained the Apple of Eden, which provides control over emotions.By using this item, you can supposedly eliminate aggression in people.The daredevil travels to the Middle Ages.He discovers that he is a descendant of a member of the Assassin secret society.Over time, he learns what a big mistake he made when he trusted Sofia and her father.

programme.title: Kinds of Kindness
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated stories.Emma Stone, Jesse Plemons and Willem Dafoe play various roles.A corporate manager (Jesse Plemons) lives under the dictates of an eccentric boss (Willem Dafoe).She puts his well-being above her own and doesn't question any outlandish demands.Stripped of his dignity, he tries to free himself from total control.A policeman (Jesse Plemons) misses his wife (Emma Stone) - a biologist who disappeared during a research expedition.A woman who survived the disaster returns, but her marriage is put to the test.The husband becomes paranoid and is not sure if this is the same beloved he once married.The heroes of the last story are members of a sect who are looking for a person with the power to resurrect the dead.The work of Yórgos Lánthimos - the director of "Poor Things" which won four Oscars.For his performance, Jesse Plemons was awarded the Palme d'Or at Cannes.

programme.title: Andrea Bocelli: Because I Believe
programme.desc: Silhouette of a famous opera singer.The camera follows Andrea Bocelli not only behind the scenes, but also off stage to show his private life - among his family and closest friends.

programme.title: BlackBerry
programme.desc: 1996. Mike and Doug, friends from their youth, run a small technology company.They create a revolutionary product, but they cannot sell it.They attract the attention of Jim, who offers to help them.

programme.title: The Glassworker
programme.desc: Vincent Oliver, the son of renowned glassmaker Tomasz, is preparing for his first exhibition when he finds a letter from his childhood friend, Alliz Amano, whom he has always loved.He recalls how - raised by a pacifist father - he saw her for the first time.Alliz arrives in Vincent's city, Waterfront, with her parent, Colonel Amano.They become a couple.Meanwhile, a war breaks out and both he and his rival for the girl's favor, Malik, join the army.Tomasz is forced to produce glass rectifiers for the army.Some time later, the girl's father dies without any news at the front.When Malik returns to town with him, Alliz rewards him with a kiss, which Vincent witnesses.Devastated, he sabotages the production of rectifiers, but this leads to tragedy.The anime-inspired production with an anti-war message is the first Pakistani film made using the hand-animated technique.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: After a painful separation, Bella and her lover can enjoy each other's company again.The teenager wants to be transformed into an immortal being, which will allow them to be united forever.Before that, however, he has to take care of more mundane matters - pass his high school leaving exams and get into college.In addition, he is worried about his friend Jacob.It turns out that soon he and Edward will have to join forces to ensure the safety of the girl who has won their hearts.The relative peace of all the bloodsuckers and werewolves of Forks is disturbed by disturbing news from Seattle.It turns out that mysterious murders are taking place there.People are being killed by a pack of vampires, spreading fear and destruction around.The gang is recruiting new members.It is headed by Riley.He was chosen as the leader by the vengeful Victoria, who is seeking Bella's life.Thanks to Alice's visions and the Cullens' vigilance, they manage to protect her.Enemy races unite in the face of danger.

programme.title: Death Of A Comedian
programme.desc: Argentine actor Juan Debré (Diego Peretti) receives a disturbing diagnosis at the peak of his career.He escapes to Belgium to immerse himself in his own, safe reality.

credits.actor: Waiter in Brussels city - Andrés Guillín
Passenger at the tram stop - Elodie Barthels

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
programme.desc: The hobbit Bilbo (Martin Freeman), Gandalf (Ian McKellen) and the dwarves led by Thorin (Richard Armitage) continue their dangerous journey.The goal of their expedition is to regain Erebor - the kingdom of the dwarves, which is currently occupied by the dragon Smaug (Benedict Cumberbatch).The travelers meet the bear warrior Beorn (Mikael Persbrandt), giant spiders inhabiting Mirkwood, the Wood Elves and their master, King Thranduil (Lee Pace), his son Legolas (Orlando Bloom), and the elf Tauriel (Evangeline Lilly).Thanks to an archer called Bard (Luke Evans), they get to Lake Town.When they reach the Lonely Mountain, they will come face to face with their greatest danger.The second part of the trilogy based on the novel by J.R.R.Tolkien.The film starred, among others: Ian McKellen ("Gods and Monsters"), Martin Freeman ("Fargo", "Sherlock") and Richard Armitage ("Versa", "Epicenter").The film, made on a grand scale, received three Oscar nominations, including for best special effects.

programme.title: The Idea of You
programme.desc: Solene (Anne Hathaway) is the owner of an art gallery.One day, a divorced woman accompanies her daughter to a concert and meets her musical idol - the singer of the boy band Hayes Campbell (Nicholas Galitzine), about whom teenagers fantasize.Despite the significant age difference, they both feel that they have a lot in common.They start an affair.Paparazzi make their romantic moments miserable.The revelation of a young musician's relationship with a middle-aged single mother turns out to be a media sensation.An unusual love story with a script based on the novel by Robinne Lee.

programme.title: Soul On Fire
programme.desc: Nine-year-old John O'Leary suffers burns to almost his entire body.He struggles with pain and limitations.However, he wins love and makes his dreams come true.He inspires others by showing how to live life to the fullest.

programme.title: Blue Moon
programme.desc: The year is 1943. The legendary lyricist Lorenz Hart (Ethan Hawke), co-author of such hits as "Blue Moon" and "My Funny Valentine", spends the night from March 31 to April 1 in Sardi's bar.In the company of friends, including his muse Elizabeth Weiland (Margaret Qualley), he struggles with wounded pride and shaken self-confidence.At this time, his former long-time collaborator Richard Rodgers (Andrew Scott) celebrates the premiere of his musical entitled"Oklahoma!", which he wrote with Oscar Hammerstein II (Simon Delaney).Two Oscar nominations.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: The further fate of a group of friends who left school behind and entered adulthood.The action moves forward several years.Rue (Zendaya Coleman) is no longer a lost teenager, but a person involved in the criminal world.He goes to interrogation in connection with smuggling drugs from Mexico.Cassie (Sydney Sweeney) and Maddy's (Alexa Demie) relationship has improved, but old wounds haven't healed at all.The first woman's relationship with Nate (Jacob Elordi) develops, but not towards a happy ending.The remaining characters confront their own choices, addiction and violence.They are looking for redemption and answers to the question about their place in the world.

programme.title: Peacemaker 2
programme.desc: Two years have passed since the last events.Chris Smith (John Cena) considers himself a real hero.However, he must earn the recognition of other heroes.

programme.title: Man on Fire
programme.desc: American John Creasy (Denzel Washington) is a man haunted by nightmares from his past.He is a former assassin who worked for the CIA for many years.Frustrated, he avoids people and seeks solace in alcohol.Creasy comes to Mexico to visit his old friend and colleague, Rayburn (Christopher Walken).The city is currently gripped by a wave of kidnappings for ransom.Rich residents panic and many of them hire security guards to ensure the safety of their children.A friend finds John a job as a bodyguard for ten-year-old Pita Ramos (Dakota Fanning), the daughter of Mexican industrialist Samuel Ramos (Marc Anthony) and his American wife Lisa (Radha Mitchell).At first, Creasy has a hard time coping with the girl's presence.Over time, however, he becomes friends with her.Under its influence, he changes his attitude to life and gives up alcohol.Soon, however, little Pita is kidnapped.The desperate man does everything to save her.

programme.title: One, two, three... You're in the game
programme.desc: Salem, Massachusetts, a town marked by a history of witch hunts.Jonah (Benjamin Evan Ainsworth) and his older brother Marcus (Asa Butterfield) come across an abandoned cabin while biking through the forest.They find a diary and a knife with a mysterious inscription on its blade.When read to her, it evokes a demon that forces young people to participate in macabre versions of children's games - from hide and seek to tag.The brothers, their sister Billy (Natalia Dyer) and her friends take part in the bloody showdown.They discover that this competition from hell cannot be won.

programme.title: Blue Moon
programme.desc: The year is 1943. The legendary lyricist Lorenz Hart (Ethan Hawke), co-author of such hits as "Blue Moon" and "My Funny Valentine", spends the night from March 31 to April 1 in Sardi's bar.In the company of friends, including his muse Elizabeth Weiland (Margaret Qualley), he struggles with wounded pride and shaken self-confidence.At this time, his former long-time collaborator Richard Rodgers (Andrew Scott) celebrates the premiere of his musical entitled"Oklahoma!", which he wrote with Oscar Hammerstein II (Simon Delaney).Two Oscar nominations.

programme.title: Daniel
programme.desc: Daniel Northcott began documenting his life and the world around him at the age of 7, when his father gave him a video camera.He filmed his family and friends, and then the places he traveled to.

programme.title: The Book of Life
programme.desc: Two powerful magicians bet whether people are pure in heart.La Muerte is the ruler of the World of the Remembered.The dead stay there, remaining in the hearts of their loved ones.Xibalba rules the Land of the Forgotten - a sad place for souls that no one remembers.The magicians are tested by: fashion matador Manolo, who dreams of being a musician, and Joaquin - an athlete and the pride of the city.The boys compete for the affections of Maria, the daughter of the local mayor.However, the beautiful bride is resistant to their advances.Manolo and Joaquin will go on a wonderful journey during which they will visit extraordinary lands, meet colorful characters and discover the truth about themselves.The project by Guillermo del Toro and Jorge R. Gutierrez was nominated for a Golden Globe in the category of best animated film.

programme.title: The Fourth Wall
programme.desc: The year 1982, war-torn Lebanon.Theater director Georges (Laurent Lafitte), in order to keep his promise to his terminally ill friend, goes to Beirut to implement a risky project.He intends to put "Antigone" on the front line to guarantee a moment of peace for the parties to the conflict.The show will feature actors involved in fighting, belonging to various political and religious factions.Marwan (Simon Abkarian) becomes a guide in an unknown city, who explains the background of the dispute to the foreigner and becomes a link with the locals.Soon Georges faces the brutal realities of war.The plans are also complicated by the feelings he has for one of the actresses, Imane (Manal Issa).

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn - Part 1
programme.desc: Bella Swan and Edward Cullen are getting married.They spend their honeymoon on a private island in Brazil belonging to the groom's family.Two weeks later, Bella discovers she is pregnant.The fetus is developing at a rapid pace.The couple returns to Forks.It turns out that Bella's condition means great danger to her.The werewolves, led by Sam, want to kill her unborn offspring, who may turn out to be a demon.Jacob defies his pack and decides to protect his lost loved one.The Cullen family prepares for a difficult birth.Edward will have to fight to save the person he loves with all his heart.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Nicky Spurgeon is a calculating fraud.The model's appearance and ability to keep cool make him a master criminal.He is able to win people over, but he does it to take advantage of them.One day, in a restaurant, he meets a fair-haired beauty, Jess Barrett, whose ambition is to pursue a criminal career.He becomes her mentor.Over time, they both realize that they have much more in common than the relationship of master and disciple.However, they live in a world where there is no place for love.Spurgeon ends this relationship.Three years pass.Nicky is in Buenos Aires, where he works for the owner of a car racing team, Rafael Garrigi.He meets his former lover here.Aware of her strengths, the femme fatale has one goal - to take revenge for the way she was once treated.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
programme.desc: The Hobbit Frodo Baggins comes into possession of a magical Ring.His relative Bilbo obtained it during his expedition to the Lonely Mountain.This extraordinary gem can give its owner control over the world, which is why its creator - the Lord of Darkness Sauron - will do anything to get it back.The wizard Gandalf knows that the Ring must be destroyed.There is only one way to do this - by throwing him into the fire that burns inside Mount Doom.However, getting there is very difficult.A council is called in Rivendell on this matter.Frodo undertakes a dangerous mission to destroy the jewel.He is accompanied by his friendly hobbits, Sam Gamgee and Pippin and Merry, as well as representatives of other races: the elf Legolas, the dwarf Gimli, people - Aragorn and Boromir - and Gandalf.The ring has a sinister power that is difficult to avoid.It arouses strong desire and influences the psyche, which puts the team to the test.Meanwhile, Sauron sends his troops against her.

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: Alita (Rosa Salazar), a cyborg girl, wakes up from a coma.It turns out that he doesn't remember who he is or where he is.Doctor Ido (Christoph Waltz) subjected her to a series of tests that revealed that she was a young woman with a unique story.Wanting to protect her, he does not reveal the truth about her past.Alita must adapt to the conditions and rules of life in Scrap City.After some time, he regains his memory thanks to the help of his friend, Hugo (Keean Johnson).Then he realizes that he has incredible fighting skills.She must use them against the power that tries to control her.The film's director is Robert Rodriguez, known from "From Dusk Till Dawn" and "Machete".The script was written by the winner of three Oscars, James Cameron, who considered making "Alita" back in the 1990s. The film was based on the manga.

programme.title: You Gotta Believe
programme.desc: A group of baseball players are having the most important season of their lives.For one of the boys, the stakes are even higher - the team fights not only for victories, but also for his father's dream to come true.

programme.title: The Doll
programme.desc: Rémi did not recover from the breakup.In order to function, he remains in a relationship with the doll Audrey, with whom he lives and shares everyday affairs.One day, a new colleague shows up at his company.
